name: Ferplast Club Collar Puppy C10/25
shortDescription: The Ferplast Club Collar C10/25 is a simple, durable, and adjustable nylon dog collar designed specifically for puppies and small breeds. It offers a comfortable, secure fit with easy adjustability, making it perfect for everyday use.
description: Key Features • Material & Design: Crafted from tough, high-quality nylon with a sleek, minimal design for comfort and long-lasting use. • Adjustability: Equipped with a sliding plastic buckle for quick and easy length adjustment, ensuring a snug yet comfortable fit as your puppy grows. • Secure Closure: Solid plastic snap clip for reliable fastening, with a quick-release feature for added convenience. • Size: Adjustable circumference from 18 cm to 25 cm with a slim 10 mm tape width, ideal for small necks without causing discomfort. • Color Options: Available in multiple colors so you can match your puppy’s personality or coordinate with other Ferplast accessories. • Compatibility: Designed to pair perfectly with other Club range products, such as matching leads and training leads. Benefits • Lightweight and comfortable for young dogs. • Adjustable fit accommodates your puppy’s growth without frequent collar replacements. • Strong yet soft materials for durability and comfort during daily wear. • Easy to put on, take off, and clean. Whether for training, walks, or everyday wear, the Ferplast Club Collar C10/25 is a practical, reliable, and stylish choice for your puppy or small dog.
